Sanctuary Quest

Welcome to Sanctuary Quest, a dungeon exploration and base management RPG. Build your Sanctuary by managing workers to generate food and materials. Recruit heroes from different classes, equip them, and venture into dangerous dungeons filled with monsters, traps, and treasures. Use tactical combat with timed abilities to defeat enemies. Progress through multiple dungeon zones, unlock advanced hero classes, and reach the Arena at Zone 3 to achieve victory!

Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and move in dungeons | Space: Select/Confirm actions | Z: Use hero abilities in combat | Shift: Speed up animations | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart

Sanctuary Quest

Welcome to Sanctuary Quest, a dungeon exploration and base management RPG. Build your Sanctuary by managing workers to generate food and materials. Recruit heroes from different classes, equip them, and venture into dangerous dungeons filled with monsters, traps, and treasures. Use tactical combat with timed abilities to defeat enemies. Progress through multiple dungeon zones, unlock advanced hero classes, and reach the Arena at Zone 3 to achieve victory!

Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and move in dungeons | Space: Select/Confirm actions | Z: Use hero abilities in combat | Shift: Speed up animations | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart

TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through the base management screen, allocate workers to food production, wait for resources to accumulate, recruit a hero, then enter the dungeon. Move through the dungeon and engage in basic combat to validate all systems work together.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully transition through all game phases (START → base management → dungeon → combat) without errors. Resource generation works, heroes can be recruited, dungeon navigation functions, and combat engages properly. Test passes when all basic interactions complete successfully.
